scene: A cartoon planet Venus with a sleepy face and a big red question mark, big black caps A DAY LONGER THAN A YEAR? Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.

Venus spinning very slowly with tiny motion marks while zooming fast around a big yellow sun on an orbit line. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.

A calendar labeled YEAR finishing before a single sunrise line labeled DAY, big black caps THE YEAR WINS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.

A birthday cake on Venus under a sun that has not moved, big black caps MORE BIRTHDAYS THAN SUNRISES. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
